18#ifndef MEDIA_C_STREAM_BUFFERS_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_STREAM_BUFFERS_H_
20
21#include <stdbool.h>
22#include <stddef.h>
23#include <string.h>
24
25#include "list.h"
26#include "stream_buffer.h"
27
28#ifdef __cplusplus
29extern "C" {
30#endif
31
42typedef list_t stream_buffers_t;
43
49static inline stream_buffers_t* stream_buffers_new(size_t initial_capacity) {
50 return list_new(initial_capacity, sizeof(stream_buffer_t));
51}
52
58static inline void stream_buffers_free(stream_buffers_t* stream_buffers, void (*free_func)(void*)) {
59 list_free(stream_buffers, free_func);
60}
61
68static inline bool stream_buffers_add(stream_buffers_t* stream_buffers, stream_buffer_t* stream_buffer) {
69 return list_add(stream_buffers, stream_buffer);
70}
71
78static inline stream_buffer_t* stream_buffers_get(const stream_buffers_t* stream_buffers, size_t index) {
79 return (stream_buffer_t*)list_get(stream_buffers, index);
80}
81
87static inline size_t stream_buffers_size(const stream_buffers_t* stream_buffers) { return stream_buffers->size; }
88
94static inline size_t stream_buffers_capacity(const stream_buffers_t* stream_buffers) {
95 return stream_buffers->capacity;
96}
97
103static inline bool stream_buffers_empty(const stream_buffers_t* stream_buffers) { return stream_buffers->size == 0U; }
104
111static inline stream_buffer_t* stream_buffers_find(const stream_buffers_t* stream_buffers, const char* name) {
112 stream_buffer_t* result = NULL;
113 for (size_t i = 0; i < stream_buffers->size; ++i) {
114 stream_buffer_t* stream_buffer = (stream_buffer_t*)list_get(stream_buffers, i);
115 if (strcmp(stream_buffer->name, name) == 0) {
116 result = stream_buffer;
117 break;
118 }
119 }
120 return result;
121}
122
128static inline void stream_buffers_clear(stream_buffers_t* stream_buffers, void (*free_func)(void*)) {
129 list_clear(stream_buffers, free_func);
130}
131
137static inline void stream_buffers_iterate(const stream_buffers_t* stream_buffers, void (*callback)(stream_buffer_t*)) {
138 if ((stream_buffers != NULL) && (callback != NULL)) {
139 for (size_t i = 0; i < stream_buffers->size; ++i) {
140 stream_buffer_t* stream_buffer = (stream_buffer_t*)list_get(stream_buffers, i);
141 callback(stream_buffer);
142 }
143 }
144}
145
146#ifdef __cplusplus
147}
148#endif
149
150#endif // MEDIA_C_STREAM_BUFFERS_H_

Generic dynamic array (list) container.
